keywordspec.name: lge.auto.SoundProcessing
keywordspec.doc:
The SoundCompare class is class of sound.
- save audio data in PC's MIC - Text to Speech - Speech Recognition - single tone sine wave compare

kw.name: Detect String in Audio
kw.doc:
Detect sting in audio file. Recognize speech using Google Speech Recognition.
:argument - ``file_path`` : the path of audio file (required)
:return - If you find some string in an audio file, return string - Else retunr -1
Examples: | ${str}= | `Detect String in Audio` | file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.wav |
kw.shortdoc: Detect sting in audio file. Recognize speech using Google Speech Recognition.

kw.name: Get Amp
kw.doc: Return average amplitude of sound file :argument - ``wav_path`` : path of wav file :return - value of Amplitude Examples: | ${amp}= | `Get Amp` | test.wav |
kw.shortdoc: Return average amplitude of sound file :argument - ``wav_path`` : path of wav file :return - value of Amplitude Examples: | ${amp}= | `Get Amp` | test.wav |

kw.name: Get Hz
kw.doc: Return input single tone sine wave frequency :argument - ``wav_path`` : path of wav file :return - value of Hz Examples: | ${hz}= | `Get Hz` | test.wav |
kw.shortdoc: Return input single tone sine wave frequency :argument - ``wav_path`` : path of wav file :return - value of Hz Examples: | ${hz}= | `Get Hz` | test.wav |

kw.name: Record Audio By Read
kw.doc:
Save PC mic line raw data to audio file
:argument - ``file_path`` : the path of audio file (required) - ``timeout`` : duration of saving time. default value is 5
Examples: | `Save Audio File` | file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.wav | timeout=10 | | `Save Audio File` | file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.wav |
kw.shortdoc: Save PC mic line raw data to audio file

kw.name: Save Audio File
kw.doc:
Save PC mic line raw data to audio file
:argument - ``file_path`` : the path of audio file (required) - ``timeout`` : duration of saving time. default value is 5
Examples: | `Save Audio File` | file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.wav | timeout=10 | | `Save Audio File` | file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.wav |
kw.shortdoc: Save PC mic line raw data to audio file

kw.name: Search Frequency in Audio
kw.doc:
Get the frequency in pre-recorded sound file and check if it exits in the record evironment sound file :argument - ``path_acture_wav`` : Record evironment sound file. - ``path_expect_wav`` : Pre-recorded sound file :return - string Match or No_match
Examples: | ${result}= | `Search Frequency in Audio` | data_test/test.wav | | data_expect/test_1.wav|
kw.shortdoc: Get the frequency in pre-recorded sound file and check if it exits in the record evironment sound file :argument - ``path_acture_wav`` : Record evironment sound file. - ``path_expect_wav`` : Pre-recorded sound file :return - string Match or No_match

kw.name: Text to Speech
kw.doc:
Text to Speech. Use pyttsx3.
:argument - ``str_talk`` : string that you want to make a speech (required) - ``rate`` : speaking speed - ``volume`` : volume
Examples: | `Text to Speech` | Hello ID |
